rulings.Case Title: FOLSOM DORE ASSOCIATES, L.P. VS. CURTIS KULP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc And Motion To Set Aside Judgment And Sert Case For Trial
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 6, 2011, line 3. Defendant Curtis Kulp's motion to set aside judgment and set case for trial. Grant, subject to opposition, on condition defendant post rent for November and December. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JIM KHORGE VS. JAMILEH MSALAM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Claim Of Right To Possession And Notice Of Hearing
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 6, 2011, line 1. Defendant Jamileh Msalam's claim of right to possession and notice of hearing. Hearing required to show valid written contract with third party. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION A/K/A VS. MONICA DENISE KENNEY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 06, 2011, line 5. Defendant James Leonard's Motion to Set Aside Default; Default Judgment; Leave to Defend. Hearing required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MURPHY INVESTMENTS, INC., A CALIFORNIA VS. JOY LEFCOURT COX et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 6, 2011, line 4. Defendant Joy Cox' demurrer to 2nd amended complaint. Overruled with 5 days to answer. Amended complaint sufficiently pleads standing per court order of 11/22/11. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DMG ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. ARATH ARELLANO et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 6, 2011, line 2. Defendant Arath Arellano's motion to strike complaint. Grant, motion to Strike, request for attorneys fees, because plaintiff alleges oral rental agreement. (501/REQ)
